zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Boteler於1360年12月31日出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼時，她的父親James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond29歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond28歲。她和Sir Tiege O Carrol Ó Cearbhaill King of Ely至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1392年11月7日在愛爾蘭享年31歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 奧法利可隆馬可諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Boteler于1360年12月31日出生在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼时，她的父亲James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond29岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond28岁。她和Sir Tiege O Carrol Ó Cearbhaill King of Ely至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1392年11月7日在爱尔兰享年31岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 奧法利可隆馬可諾。

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Boteler was born on 31 December 1360, in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland, her father, James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond, was 29 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, was 28. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Sir Tiege O Carrol Ó Cearbhaill King of Ely. She died on 7 November 1392, in Ireland, at the age of 31, and was buried in Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Ireland.

fr.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irlande
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Boteler est née le 31 décembre 1360, à Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande, son père, James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Sir Tiege O Carrol Ó Cearbhaill King of Ely. Elle est décédée le 7 novembre 1392, à Irlande, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterrée à Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Irlande.

de.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irland
de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Boteler am 31. Dezember 1360 in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond 29 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond 28. Sie hatte mit Sir Tiege O Carrol Ó Cearbhaill King of Ely mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. November 1392 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Irland und wurde in Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Boteler è nata il il 31 dicembre 1360 nel Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, sua padre, James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Sir Tiege O Carrol Ó Cearbhaill King of Ely. Morì il 7 novembre 1392, nel Irlanda, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolta a Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Botelerが1360年12月31日にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーで生まれた時，父James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormondは29歳，母Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormondは28歳であった。彼女はSir Tiege O Carrol Ó Cearbhaill King of Elyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1392年11月7日にアイルランドで31歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ オファリークロンマクノイゼにて埋葬された。

ko.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: 아일랜드 카운티 프 테 크로스 프 티페라리
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Boteler(이)가 1360년 12월 31일 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Sir Tiege O Carrol Ó Cearbhaill King of Ely(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1392년 11월 7일 아일랜드에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 파리 클론마c노이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Boteler nasceu em 31 de dezembro de 1360, em Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, seu pai, James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Sir Tiege O Carrol Ó Cearbhaill King of Ely. Ela faleceu em 7 de novembro de 1392, em Irlanda, com 31 anos, e foi sepultada em Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Irlanda.

ru.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: коунти оф т кросс оф типпирэри, Ирландия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Boteler родилась 31 декабря 1360 г. в местности килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия, её отцу по имени James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Sir Tiege O Carrol Ó Cearbhaill King of Ely. Она умерла 7 ноября 1392 г. в местности Ирландия в возрасте 31 год и была похоронена в местности клонмакноис, коунти оффали, Ирландия.
